name: zinput_mouse_set_client_size_and_center
description: zInput::Mouse_SetClientSizeAndCenter stores mouse client dimensions, signed half-size centers, and inverse-center scale factors.
known_limits: Reviewed VC byte comparison from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zinput_mouse_set_client_size_and_center failed under VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 38 unmasked mismatches, 38 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 76, VC object size 80, 1 trailing VC NOP trimmed; see build/vc6-verify/zinput_mouse_set_client_size_and_center/verify/4701a0_byte_triage.txt.

The reviewed byte drift is register allocation and instruction scheduling in the signed-half-size and inverse-center math; the native smoke verifies even and odd dimensions plus inverse-center factors.
